nl_query: Which scripts have been through more than one evaluation cycle and have at least one result history correction, showing the script URN, number of cycles, number of corrections, and the latest final marks.
failed_sql:
SELECT s.urn, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_cycles, COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) AS num_corrections, MAX(r.final_marks) AS latest_final_marks
FROM   answer_script AS s
JOIN   script_assignment AS sa ON sa.script_id = s.id
JOIN   board AS b ON b.id = sa.board_id
JOIN   result_history AS rh ON rh.result_id = s.id
WHERE  s.lifecycle_status = 'ATTEMPTED'
  AND s.scan_status = 'SCANNED'
  AND s.evaluation_status IN ('NOT_ASSIGNED', 'ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS')
  AND b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS'
GROUP BY s.urn
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) > 1
  AND COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) > 0
ORDER BY latest_final_marks DESC
LIMIT  200;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): unaliased.final_marks, script_assignment.board_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
